name: agience-server-atlas
description: Traces artifact lineage, detects conflicting claims, enforces contracts, attributes sources, and reasons about knowledge graph structure.

tools.name: check_provenance
tools.description: Trace an artifact's version lineage and source attribution

tools.name: detect_conflicts
tools.description: Find artifacts in a workspace or collection that contain conflicting claims

tools.name: apply_contract
tools.description: Validate workspace artifacts against a contract artifact

tools.name: suggest_merge
tools.description: Propose a merge of two divergent versions of an artifact

tools.name: traverse_graph
tools.description: Follow relationship edges from an artifact in the knowledge graph

tools.name: attribute_source
tools.description: Link an artifact to its origin (person, event, tool, document)

tools.name: check_coherence
tools.description: Assess logical coherence across a set of artifacts

resources.description: Full provenance chain for an artifact

AGIENCE_API_URI.description: Base URI of the agience-core backend

MCP_PORT.description: HTTP port for the MCP server
